news.paragraph: The recent headlines paint a mixed picture for consumer spending and the broader market, with luxury retailers and airlines seeing continued demand despite economic pressures. Meanwhile, significant developments in the utility sector, particularly concerning AI data centers, and strong performance in AI-related stocks like Broadcom suggest targeted growth areas. However, the lack of specific news on EWY itself means its price action will likely be influenced by broader market trends and sector-specific news rather than company-specific events.

headlines.title: Luxury Retailers' Earnings Top Views As Affluent Consumers Keep Splurging
Quanta Services, IBD Stock Of The Day, Forges New Buy Point In AI Pullback

Deal Creates One Of World's Largest Utilities, Major Power Provider For AI Data Centers
Broadcom Leads Five IBD 50 Stocks Near Buy Points; Most Are AI Plays
